subject: [PATCH v9 06/15] mm: add MM_CP_UFFD_RWP change_protection() flag

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch adds two new flags to the change_protection() function: MM_CP_UFFD_RWP and MM_CP_UFFD_RWP_RESOLVE. These flags are used for userfaultfd Remote Write Protection (RWP) and allow for the installation of a PAGE_NONE PTE with the uffd bit set, distinguishing it from other faults such as mprotect(PROT_NONE). The patch also updates various functions in the mm module to handle these new flags correctly, ensuring that anon, shmem, THP, and hugetlb all share the same semantics. This is a preparatory patch for userfaultfd RWP functionality.
